findings.title: Resource accessed by request-supplied id without ownership check
findings.rationale: Endpoint resolves a resource from a client-supplied identifier with no check that the authenticated principal owns or may access it (IDOR / missing authorization).

findings.title: Outbound request to user-controlled URL (possible SSRF)
findings.rationale: A network request target is derived from request input without allowlisting; may permit SSRF to internal services.
